creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is there a reason for the CONFLICTS line here? I see no other version in
the tree,
and now it only CONFLICTS with itself.

[jhelfman@dormouse.experts-exchange ~/workspace/ports/lang/open-cobol]$
make -V CONFLICTS
open-cobol-1.[1]*
[jhelfman@dormouse.experts-exchange ~/workspace/ports/lang/open-cobol]$
make -V PORTVERSION
1.1

Thanks!
-jgh
